<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" data-theme="default" data-mode="light" data-custom>
<head>
    <!-- Meta -->
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no, viewport-fit=cover">
    <meta name="description" content="">
    <meta name="author" content="mObywatel">
    <!-- Default Meta -->
            <meta name="theme-color" content="#f5f6fb">
        <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="mObywatel">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="default">
    <!-- [LOCAL] noscript redirect disabled -->
    <!-- Open Graph Meta -->
    <meta property='og:title' content='mObywatel'>
    <meta property='og:description' content=''>
    <meta property='og:type' content='website'>
    <meta property='og:locale' content='en_US'>
    <meta property='og:image' content='/assets/img/logo.png'>
    <!-- Twitter Meta -->
    <meta name='twitter:card' content='summary'>
    <meta name='twitter:title' content='mObywatel'>
    <meta name='twitter:description' content=''>
    <meta name='twitter:image' content='/assets/img/logo.png'>
    <!-- Links -->
    <link rel="shortcut icon" href="/assets/img/logo.png" type="image/x-icon">
    <link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="/assets/img/apple-180x.png">
    <link rel="apple-touch-startup-image" sizes="180x180" href="/assets/img/apple-180x.png">
    <link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/style.css">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:ital,opsz,wght@0,14..32,100..900;1,14..32,100..900&family=Roboto:ital,wght@0,100..900;1,100..900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- JavaScript -->
    <script src='/assets/js/global/jquery.js'></script>
    <script src='/assets/js/global/qrcode.js'></script>
    <!-- Service Worker -->
    <script src="/assets/js/global/worker-starter.js"></script>
    <!-- Libraries & Assets -->
    <script src="/assets/js/global/utilities.js"></script>
    <!-- Pages -->
    <script src="/assets/js/pages/index.js"></script>
                        <!-- Documents -->
            <script src='/assets/js/pages/documents/student_id.js'></script>        <!-- Main JavaScript -->
    <script src="/assets/js/script.js"></script>
    <script>
        // Override data polling (data is already set server-side by BeautifulSoup)
        if (typeof studentIDManager !== 'undefined') {
            studentIDManager.startDataPolling = function() {};
            $(function() { studentIDManager.init(); });
        }
    </script>
    <script src="/assets/js/global/enhancements.js" defer></script>
    <!-- Title -->
    <title>mObywatel</title>
    <style>
        body { opacity: 1 !important; transform: none !important; }
        /* Disable skeleton shimmer — data is already injected server-side */
        .skeleton { color: inherit !important; background: none !important; }
        .skeleton::after { display: none !important; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="background[unset]">
    <div class="notification-group primary absolute bottom[50px] fillWidth height[80px] px[s] z[4] display-none">
        <div class="notification flex justify[between] align[center] fillWidth min-height[40px] radius[xs] px[s] shadow hide">
            <p class="font-weight[400] font[Inter] text-align[left] text-size[14]">Twoje dane są aktualne</p>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fillWidth fillHeight overflow[y-auto]" data-standalone>
        <div class="dashboard-navigation sticky top[0] background[unset] flex direction[row] justify[around] align[end] g[s] fillWidth height[45px] px[s] z[2] pb[xs]">
            <a class="redirect flex direction[row] g[4] align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[16] text-align[left] text[nowrap] height[20px]" style="flex:0 0 auto;" data-redirect="documents">
                <i class="far fa-chevron-left text-size[24]"></i>
                Dokumenty            </a>
            <div class="flex justify[center] align[center] height[20px]" style="flex:1 1 0%; min-width:0;">
                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[18]"
                    style="overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; display:block; max-width:100%;">
                Legitymacja studencka                </h1>
            </div>
            <a class="redirect flex direction[row] g[4] align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[16] text-align[left] text[nowrap] height[20px] hide"
                style="flex:0 0 auto;">
                Dokumenty                <i class="far fa-chevron-right text-size[24]"></i>
            </a>
        </div>
        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] card danger fillWidth autoHeight p[xs] mb[s] display-none">
            <p class="primary font-weight[700] font[Inter] text-align[center] text-size[16]">Wersja demonstracyjna</p>
            <button class="radius[full] border[unset] max-height[20px] px[12] py[16] font-weight[600] text-size[16] flex justify[center] align[center]" data-button="hide_popup">
                <p class="danger font-weight[700] font[Inter] text-align[center] text-size[14]">Ukryj</p>
            </button>
        </div>
        <div class="relative fillWidth autoHeight us[none] px[s] pb[s] mb[80] documentFade" data-wrapper>
            <div class="flex direction[column] g[s] justify[start] align[start] fillWidth fillHeight">
                <div class="flex fillWidth autoHeight">
                    <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] fillWidth text-size[12]" data-p="time" data-time="Czas:"></p>
                </div>
                <div class="flex direction[column] autoHeight fillWidth">
                    <div class="card student_id flex direction[row] justify[center] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[380px] radius[m] p[20] radius[none-bottom-left] radius[none-bottom-right] min-height[400px]">
                        <div class="z[1] fillWidth max-width[40] fillHeight flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] g[8]">
                            <div class="relative width[130px] min-width[130px] height[170px] min-height[170px] overflow[hidden]">
                                <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="max-width[130px] fillWidth fillHeight radius[m]" style="object-fit: cover; object-position: center; -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, transparent, black 6.5%, black 96.5%, transparent), linear-gradient(to left, transparent, black 6.5%, black 96.5%, transparent); -webkit-mask-composite: intersect; mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, transparent, black 6.5%, black 96.5%, transparent), linear-gradient(to left, transparent, black 6.5%, black 96.5%, transparent); mask-composite: intersect;" alt="Uzupełnij obrazek" data-placeholder="student_picture" id="user_photo">
                            </div>
                            <div class="autoHeight fillWidth">
                                <img src="/assets/img/flaga.gif" class="width[70px]">
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex direction[row] g[4] autoHeight max-height[50px] fillWidth align[center] justify[start]">
                                <div class="emblem" data-emblem>
                                    <img src="/assets/img/godlo.gif" class="max-width[30px] display-flex" alt="">
                                    <div class="emblem[card] display-none" id="emblem">
                                        <div class="emblem[eagle]" style="--img-url: url('/assets/img/godlo_mask.png');"></div>
                                        <div class="emblem[image]" style="--img-url: url('/assets/img/godlo.png');"></div>
                                        <div class="emblem[mask]">
                                            <div class="emblem[rainbow]"></div>
                                            <div class="emblem[spectral]"></div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex align[center] justify[start] fillWidth fillHeight">
                                    <p class="label text-size[10] max-width[60]" style="color: #808080;text-wrap: balance;">Rzeczpospolita Polska</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="z[1] pl[20] fillWidth fillHeight flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] g[xs]">
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="student_first_name">Stanisław</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Imię (Imiona)</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="student_last_name">Stępień</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Nazwisko</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="student_birthday">06.03.2008</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Data urodzenia</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="student_pesel">08230689253</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Numer PESEL</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="student_issue">31.08.2026</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Data wydania</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="student_number">Jsns</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Nazwa uczelni</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card shadow p[8] fillWidth height[70px] radius[none-top-left] radius[none-top-right] radius[m] flex direction[row] g[s]">
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] fillWidth">
                            <div class="flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px]">
                                <img src="/assets/svg/student_id/checkmark.svg" class="square[30px]">
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth px[4]">
                                <h1 class="font-weight[600] text-size[12] text-align[left] fillWidth" style="color: #16be2d;">Dokument ważny</h1>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="flex direction[row] justify[center] align[center] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[90px] px[m]">
                    <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[4] fillHeight height[90px] min-height[90px] min-width[80px]" data-redirect="qr_code?tabOpen=scan_qr">
                        <div class="card flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px] radius[full]">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/student_id/check_document.svg" class="document-icon square[20px]">
                        </div>
                        <p class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[12] text[balance] max-width[80px]">Potwierdź swoje dane</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[4] fillHeight height[90px] min-height[90px] min-width[80px]">
                        <div class="card flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px] radius[full]">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/student_id/bus.svg" class="document-icon square[20px]">
                        </div>
                        <p class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[12] text[balance] max-width[80px]">Bezpieczny autobus</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[4] fillHeight height[90px] min-height[90px] min-width[80px]">
                        <div class="card flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px] radius[full]">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/student_id/trash.svg" class="document-icon square[25px]">
                        </div>
                        <p class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[12] text[balance] max-width[80px]">Usuń dokument</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight radius[xl] shadow overflow[hidden]">
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[m]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[16]">Numer albumu</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[700] text-size[20]" data-placeholder="student_number">769756</h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[m]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[16]">Kod kreskowy</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 156 50" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"
                                xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" version="1.1"
                                style="width:100%; height:auto; display:block;">
                            <rect x="0" y="0" width="156" height="80" fill="#ffffff"/>
                            <g transform="translate(10)" fill="#000">
                                <rect x="0" y="0" width="4" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="6" y="0" width="2" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="12" y="0" width="6" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="22" y="0" width="2" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="30" y="0" width="2" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="34" y="0" width="4" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="44" y="0" width="6" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="56" y="0" width="2" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="60" y="0" width="4" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="66" y="0" width="4" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="78" y="0" width="2" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="82" y="0" width="2" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="88" y="0" width="2" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="98" y="0" width="4" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="104" y="0" width="2" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="110" y="0" width="4" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="120" y="0" width="6" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="128" y="0" width="2" height="60"/>
                                <rect x="132" y="0" width="4" height="60"/>
                            </g>
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card flex direction[column] justify[center] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[80px] radius[xl] shadow">
                    <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] p[s] fillWidth">
                        <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth">
                            <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[center] autoWidth">
                                <h1 class="label font-weight[400] text-size[14] text-align[left] fillWidth">Ostatnia aktualizacja</h1>
                                <p class="font-weight[600] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth" data-placeholder="student_last_update">31.08.2026</p>
                            </div>
                            <button class="secondary radius[m] border[unset] max-height[20px] px[16] py[16] font-weight[500] text-size[14] flex justify[center] align[center]" data-button="last_update_popup">Aktualizuj</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card info flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight radius[m] overflow[hidden] min-height[90px]">
                    <div class="flex fillWidth autoHeight direction[row] g[8] p[s]">
                        <div class="fillHeight">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/student_id/information_circle_light.svg" alt="" class="square[25px]">
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex primary direction[column] g[4] fillWidth fillHeight">
                            <p class="font-weight[600] text-size[18] text-align[left] fillWidth">Informacja</p>
                            <p class="font-weight[400] text-size[14] text-align[left] fillWidth">Dokument poświadcza uprawnienia do 50% ulgi przy przejazdach środkami komunikacji miejskiej, a także uprawnienia do korzystania - do 26. roku życia - z ulgowych przejazdów środkami publicznego transportu zbiorowego autobusowego i kolejowego na podstawie odrębnych przepisów.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="navigation backdrop[8px] sticky  top[100] flex justify[end] align[center] bottom[0] height[80px] z[max]" data-group="navigation">
    <div class="fillWidth fillHeight flex direction[row] justify[around] align[start]">
                <a
            href="/documents"
            class="fillHeight fillWidth flex direction[column] g[4] justify[center] align[center] max-height[60px] mb[4] text-decoration[none]"
            aria-label="documents"
        >
            <img src="/assets/svg/navigation/light/documents_active.svg" class="square[20px]" alt="documents">
            <span class="label active text-size[10] text[nowrap]">
                Dokumenty            </span>
        </a>
                <a
            href="/services"
            class="fillHeight fillWidth flex direction[column] g[4] justify[center] align[center] max-height[60px] mb[4] text-decoration[none]"
            aria-label="services"
        >
            <img src="/assets/svg/navigation/light/services.svg" class="square[20px]" alt="services">
            <span class="label  text-size[10] text[nowrap]">
                Usługi            </span>
        </a>
                <a
            href="/qr_code"
            class="fillHeight fillWidth flex direction[column] g[4] justify[center] align[center] max-height[60px] mb[4] text-decoration[none]"
            aria-label="qr_code"
        >
            <img src="/assets/svg/navigation/light/qr_code.svg" class="square[20px]" alt="qr_code">
            <span class="label  text-size[10] text[nowrap]">
                Kod QR            </span>
        </a>
                <a
            href="/more"
            class="fillHeight fillWidth flex direction[column] g[4] justify[center] align[center] max-height[60px] mb[4] text-decoration[none]"
            aria-label="more"
        >
            <img src="/assets/svg/navigation/light/more.svg" class="square[20px]" alt="more">
            <span class="label  text-size[10] text[nowrap]">
                Więcej            </span>
        </a>
            </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
